There are 10 public schools and 5 Catholic schools serving Blue Grass Meadows. The special programs offered at local schools include Advanced Placement, French Immersion, and International Baccalaureate.
section_summaries.parks: Fun is easy to find at the many parks & rec facilities here. Parks in Blue Grass Meadows feature playgrounds for kids, sports parks, and skating.
